ANN TAYLOR SCHWIND
DANIEL L. SIMMONS
JAMES C. TRAYLOR

MARTIN MC. DONOUGH
(1915-1987)

June 7, 1991

Mr. Jeevan Ahuja
Counsel, Legal Division
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J Street, Suite 800
Sacramento, CA 95804

HAND DELIVERED

Re: West Sacramento / Master Planning Agreement

Dear Mr. Ahuja:

As a follow up to the meeting this past Wednesday attended by my partner, Brent Hawkins, we have modified the Master Planning Agreement by adding the new language that you will find in Section 7.2. As was discussed with you, it is the intention of one of the major property owners within the Planning Area to separately enter into a mirror agreement with the same master planner to develop a specific plan for his property.

Also enclosed is the form of funding agreement whereby the major property owner will advance funds to the City for the Master Planning contract.

The City has scheduled these agreements for action on Wednesday, June 12, as there is a great urgency to get on with this planning process.

We think that the language that we have incorporated into the agreement addresses the regulations, policies and opinions of your Commission as we understand them, and it would be very helpful to us if, at the earliest possible time, and before June 12th if at all possible, to have an

indication from you on whether you think the procedure we are following
now is an appropriate one and whether you would be able to issue an advice
letter to that effect.

Very truly yours,

[signature]
Joseph E. Coomes, Jr.

Enclosures
